---
title: "mETHYLotest Tutorial: NGS Methylation Analysis (WGBS, RRBS, Nanopore, PacBio)"
#date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: show
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  eval    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

# Introduction

**mETHYLotest** provides an NGS methylation module for analysing data from:

| Technology | Tools supported |
|---|---|
| **Short-read WGBS** | Bismark (CytosineReport, Coverage) |
| **Short-read RRBS** | Bismark, AMP |
| **Oxford Nanopore** | modkit (bedMethyl), f5c / Nanopolish |
| **PacBio HiFi** | pb-CpG-tools |

The module wraps [methylKit](https://github.com/al2na/methylKit)
and provides:

- Interactive project setup UI with preset column mappings
- Iterative QC with adjustable coverage thresholds and control genome monitoring
- Automatic detection and reporting of control genomes (pUC19, Lambda, E. coli, PhiX)
- Multi-scenario differential methylation (Basic, Batch, Covariate, Full)
- Tiling window analysis (region-level DMRs)
- Genome segmentation (UMR/LMR/PMD/HMR)
- Signature generation, validation (SVM/PCA/Silhouette) and benchmarking
- Genomic annotation (annotatr)
- Automated HTML reporting (QC + Final)

[View example Final Report](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/OMICShub-Imagine/mETHYLotest/blob/main/inst/tutorials/NGS_DEMO_Final_Report.html){target="_blank"}

---

# Requirements

## R packages

```{r install}
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

# Core
BiocManager::install(c("methylKit", "annotatr"))

# CRAN dependencies (installed with mETHYLotest)
install.packages(c(
  "shiny", "shinydashboard", "shinyjs", "shinyFiles",
  "readxl", "writexl", "DT", "fs", "parallel",
  "plotly", "ggplot2", "caret", "e1071", "cluster", "pROC",
  "rmarkdown", "knitr"
))
```

## Input files

Two inputs are required:

1. **A metadata Excel file** (`.xlsx`) -- see Section \@ref(metadata).
2. **Methylation call files** -- one per sample, in any supported format.

## Metadata file format {#metadata}

The Excel file must contain **three required columns**:

| Column | Type | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Sample_ID` | character | Unique sample identifier | `CTRL_01` |
| `Path` | character | Absolute path to the methylation call file | `/data/ctrl1.bed` |
| `Treatment` | integer | Group assignment: `0` = Control, `1` = Case | `0` |

> **`Treatment`** must be strictly `0` or `1`. Other values will cause
> an error.

Any **additional columns** (e.g. `Batch`, `Sex`, `Age`) are preserved
and available for **batch correction** and **covariate adjustment**.

### Example metadata

| Sample_ID | Path | Treatment | Batch | Sex |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ctrl1 | /data/ctrl1_modkit.bed | 0 | B1 | F |
| ctrl2 | /data/ctrl2_modkit.bed | 0 | B2 | M |
| case1 | /data/case1_modkit.bed | 1 | B1 | F |
| case2 | /data/case2_modkit.bed | 1 | B2 | M |

---

# Pipeline Overview

```
mETHYLotest.NGS.pipeline()
        |
   methylKit::methRead()        Import methylation call files
        |
   Coordinate offset            (for 0-based BED -> 1-based)
        |
   Pre-compute control genomes  (pUC19, Lambda, E.coli, PhiX)
        |
   Iterative QC loop            Coverage filtering + sample exclusion
        |                       + control genome QC report
   normalizeCoverage()          Coverage normalization (optional)
        |
   methylKit::unite()           Intersect CpGs across all samples
        |
   Correlation + Clustering     Sample quality assessment
        |
   calculateDiffMeth()          Multi-scenario differential methylation
        |                       (Basic, Batch, Covariate, Full Model)
   Export DMCs                   Excel + BED
        |
   tileMethylCounts()           Tiling windows (optional, region-level)
        |
   methSeg()                    Genome segmentation (optional, HMM)
        |
   Default signatures           Top 500 DMCs by combined score
        |
   DiffMeth UI                  Interactive explorer + user signatures
        |
   Signature Validation         SVM / PCA / Silhouette
        |
   Validation UI + Report       Interactive benchmark
        |
   Genomic Annotation           annotatr
        |
   Final Report                 HTML summary
```

---

# Usage

## Full Pipeline (Recommended)

```{r pipeline-full}
library(mETHYLotest)

# Opens the project setup UI, then runs the full pipeline
results <- mETHYLotest.NGS.pipeline()

# Or re-run an existing project
results <- mETHYLotest.NGS.pipeline(
  project_directory = "/path/to/My_NGS_Project"
)
```

The function returns a named list:

```{r results-structure}
names(results)
# [1] "meth"               "diff_results"       "tiles_results"
# [4] "seg_results"        "validation_results"  "annotated"
# [7] "config"
```

## Step-by-Step

```{r pipeline-steps}
library(mETHYLotest)

# 1. Create project via UI
project_dir <- mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI()

# 2. Load config
source(file.path(project_dir, "Results", "project_config.R"))
cfg <- project_config

# 3. Re-open DiffMeth UI on existing results
diff_results <- readRDS(
  file.path(project_dir, "data", "interim", "diff_results_list.rds"))
mETHYLotest.NGS.DiffMeth.UI(
  diff_results,
  output_dir = file.path(project_dir, "Results", "DiffMeth_Figures"))

# 4. Re-open Validation UI
validation_results <- readRDS(
  file.path(project_dir, "data", "interim", "validation_results.rds"))
mETHYLotest.NGS.Validate.UI(validation_results)
```

## Reloading an Existing Project

```{r reload}
# Via pipeline (auto-detects)
results <- mETHYLotest.NGS.pipeline("/path/to/My_NGS_Project")

# Via UI
project_dir <- mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI()

# Direct RDS loading
diff_results <- readRDS("My_Project/data/interim/diff_results_list.rds")
```

---

## Standalone Usage (without the full pipeline)

You can use mETHYLotest functions individually on any methylKit object:

### QC on an existing methylRawList

```r
library(mETHYLotest)
library(methylKit)

# Your existing methylKit object
myobj <- methRead(...)
myobj_filt <- filterByCoverage(myobj, lo.count = 10, hi.perc = 99.9)

# Run QC analysis
qc <- mETHYLotest.NGS.QC(
  methyl_obj      = myobj_filt,
  output_base_dir = "my_qc_output/",
  chromosomes     = paste0("chr", c(1:22, "X", "Y")),
  current_min_cov = 10,
  unite_destrand  = TRUE
)

# Open interactive QC dashboard
mETHYLotest.NGS.QC.UI(
  df_meth    = qc$df_meth,
  df_controls = qc$df_controls,
  df_stats   = qc$df_stats,
  df_global_meth = qc$df_global_meth
)
```

### Generate QC report

```{r}
mETHYLotest.NGS.GenerateQCReport(
  df_meth     = qc$df_meth,
  df_controls = qc$df_controls,
  df_stats    = qc$df_stats,
  df_global_meth = qc$df_global_meth,
  min_cov     = 10,
  excluded_samples = c("bad_sample_1"),
  output_file = "My_QC_Report.html"
)
```

### Validate Signatures on an existing methylBase

```{r}
meth <- methylKit::unite(myobj_filt, destrand = TRUE)
diff <- methylKit::calculateDiffMeth(meth)

# Create signature file (one locus per line)
sig <- paste0(diff_data$chr, ":", diff_data$start, "-", diff_data$end)
writeLines(sig[1:100], "my_signature.txt")

# Validate
val <- mETHYLotest.NGS.validate(
  meth = meth,
  diff_results = list(Basic = diff),
  signatures_folder = ".",
  diff_cutoff = 10,
  diff_qvalue = 0.05
)

# Interactive exploration
mETHYLotest.NGS.Validate.UI(val)
```

---

# Demo Mode {#demo}

A built-in demo is available to test the full pipeline without
providing your own data. It uses synthetic CX reports bundled
with the package.

## Quick Start

```{r demo-launch}
library(mETHYLotest)
mETHYLotest.NGS.pipeline("demo")
```

This will:

1. Locate the demo metadata and synthetic CX reports inside the package
2. Resolve file paths automatically
3. Open the Project Setup UI with the metadata path **pre-filled**
4. Display a notification asking you to click **"Load & Validate Metadata"**

From there, configure the parameters and click
**"Generate Project"** to run the full pipeline.

## Demo Dataset

| Sample | Treatment | Group | DevDay | Run | Morphology |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| CTL1 | 0 | CTL | 0 | 100 | ABC |
| CTL2 | 0 | CTL | 1 | 100 | ABC |
| CTL3 | 0 | CTL | 2 | 101 | BCA |
| CTL4 | 0 | CTL | 3 | 101 | ABC |
| CTL5 | 0 | CTL | 4 | 101 | BCA |
| TEST1 | 1 | TEST | 0 | 100 | BCA |
| TEST2 | 1 | TEST | 1 | 100 | ABC |
| TEST3 | 1 | TEST | 2 | 101 | ABC |
| TEST4 | 1 | TEST | 3 | 101 | BCA |
| TEST5 | 1 | TEST | 4 | 101 | ABC |

The extra columns (`Group`, `DevDay`, `Run`, `Morphology`) are
available for **batch correction** and **covariate adjustment**
in the Analysis Options tab.

> **Important:** The demo dataset is entirely synthetic. The columns
> `Run`, `DevDay` and `Morphology` are fictitious and serve only to
> demonstrate the multi-scenario feature. In a real experiment, use
> genuine technical batches (sequencing run, slide) or biological
> confounders (sex, age).

## Recommended Demo Settings

For a quick test run, use these settings in the UI:

| Tab | Parameter | Value | Why |
|---|---|---|---|
| Import | Assembly | `hg38` | Reference genome |
| Import | Pipeline | `bismarkCytosineReport` | Demo file format |
| QC | Min coverage | `1` | Synthetic data, low coverage |
| Analysis | Destrand | `TRUE` | CpG context, merge strands |
| Analysis | Tiling | `FALSE` | Skip for speed |
| Analysis | Segmentation | `FALSE` | Skip for speed |
| Analysis | Diff cutoff | `10%` | Standard threshold |

## Testing All 4 Differential Methylation Scenarios

The pipeline supports up to 4 scenarios depending on your configuration.
To test them all with the demo data:

In **Tab 5 - Review & Launch**, enable:

| Option | Setting | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| Batch Correction | select **Run** only | Creates `Batch_Correction` scenario |
| Covariates | select **Morphology** only | Creates `Covariate_Adj` scenario |
| *(both enabled)* | | Also creates `Full_Model` scenario |

This produces all 4 scenarios:

| Scenario | Covariates used | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **Basic** | None | No correction (always runs) |
| **Batch_Correction** | Run | Technical batch correction |
| **Covariate_Adj** | Morphology | Biological covariate adjustment |
| **Full_Model** | Run + Morphology | Combined correction |

> **Note:** Do not select too many variables with few samples,
> or the Full_Model will be skipped (overfitting protection).
> With 10 samples, use at most 1 batch + 1 covariate variable.

## What the Demo Produces

After running the full pipeline, you will have:

| Output | Location | Content |
|---|---|---|
| QC Report | `Results/Final_QC_Report.html` | Coverage stats, controls, global methylation |
| QC Plots | `Results/QC/cov_1/` | Per-sample methylation and coverage histograms |
| Correlation | `Results/Comparative_Analysis/figures/` | Sample correlation matrix |
| Clustering | `Results/Comparative_Analysis/figures/` | Hierarchical clustering dendrogram |
| DMC files | `Results/Differential_Analysis/` | Excel + BED per scenario |
| Signatures | `Results/Signatures/` | Top 500 DMCs per scenario |
| Validation | `Results/Validation/` | HTML report with SVM, PCA, Silhouette |
| Annotation | `Results/Annotation/` | Annotated DMCs (promoters, CpG islands, etc.) |
| Final Report | `Results/Final_Report.html` | Complete summary of all analyses |

---

# Project Setup UI {#ui}

```{r ui-launch}
project_dir <- mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI()
```

The UI has five tabs:

## Tab 1 -- Data Source

Select your metadata `.xlsx` file. Required columns are validated
immediately. Additional columns are detected for batch/covariate
adjustment.

![Data Source tab](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI.DataSource.png){width=100%}

## Tab 2 -- Import Options

### Standard pipelines

| Pipeline | Input format |
|---|---|
| `bismarkCytosineReport` | CX_report.txt (genome-wide) |
| `bismarkCoverage` | .bismark.cov (coverage only) |
| `bismark` | Legacy format |
| `amp` | Amplicon bisulfite |

### Custom column mapping (Long-Read)

| Preset | Tool | Coverage col | Meth col | Fraction? | Offset |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **modkit** | ONT modkit | 10 | 11 | No (%) | +1 |
| **f5c** | f5c / Nanopolish | 6 | 8 | Yes (0-1) | +1 |
| **pbcpg** | pb-CpG-tools | 10 | 11 | No (%) | +1 |

> **Coordinate offset:** Long-read tools produce 0-based BED coordinates.
> An offset of `+1` converts to 1-based (methylKit).

![Import Options tab](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI.ImportOptions.png){width=100%}

## Tab 3 -- QC & Filtering

| Parameter | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `lo.count` | 10 | Minimum read count. **Used for both import and QC.** |
| `hi.perc` | 99.9 | Upper coverage percentile (removes PCR duplicates) |
| `lo.perc` | NULL | Alternative: low coverage percentile |

> These are **starting values**. The QC UI lets you refine them
> interactively during execution.

![QC & Filtering tab](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI.QCandFiltering.png){width=100%}

## Tab 4 -- Analysis Options

| Category | Key Parameters |
|---|---|
| **Unite** | `destrand` (TRUE for CpG) |
| **Coverage Normalization** | Method: median / mean (optional) |
| **Clustering** | Distance: correlation / euclidean; Method: ward / complete |
| **Tiling** | Window/step size, min CpGs (optional) |
| **Segmentation** | HMM states, min segment length (optional) |
| **DiffMeth** | Overdispersion: MN; Test: Chisq; Cutoff: 10%; Q-value: 0.05 |
| **Annotation** | Diff cutoff synced with DiffMeth; Q-value: 0.05 |

![Analysis Options](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI.AnalysisOptions_1.png){width=100%}
![Analysis Options](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI.AnalysisOptions_2.png){width=100%}

## Tab 5 -- Review & Launch

Select/deselect samples, configure batch correction and covariates,
review summary, and generate the project.

![Review & Launch](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI.ReviewandLaunch_1.png){width=100%}
![Review & Launch](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.ProjectUI.ReviewandLaunch_2.png){width=100%}

---

# Pipeline Details

## Smart Loading

The pipeline checks for `myobj_raw.rds` before importing. If found,
import is skipped:

```{r smart-load}
# First run: imports from raw files (slow)
# Second run: loads from data/interim/myobj_raw.rds (instant)
```

## Control Genome Detection

Before QC, the pipeline pre-computes control genome data from **all
original samples** (never lost even when samples are excluded).

| Control | Patterns | Expected | If wrong |
|---|---|---|---|
| **pUC19** | pUC19, chrPUC, NC_001773 | **~100%** | Over-conversion |
| **Lambda** | lambda, chrL, J02459, NC_001416 | **~0%** | Incomplete conversion |
| **E. coli** | NC_000913 | **~0%** | Incomplete conversion |
| **PhiX** | phiX, NC_001422 | **~0%** | Incomplete conversion |

## Iterative QC Loop

```
repeat {
  1. Coverage filters (lo.count, hi.perc)
  2. Chromosome filtering
  3. Sample exclusion (manual + auto-empty)
  4. QC metrics + control assessment
  5. Interactive QC UI
  6. User: "proceed" or "update"
}
```

Each iteration saves QC plots in a separate directory.
Empty samples are automatically removed with a check that
both treatment groups remain.

![QC - CpG Positions](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.QC_UI.CpGpos.png){width=100%}
![QC - Controls](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.QC_UI.Controls.png){width=100%}
![QC - Overview](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.QC_UI.OverwiewMet.png){width=100%}
![QC - Refine](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.QC_UI.Refine_and_Validate.png){width=100%}

### Saved QC Artifacts

| File | Content |
|---|---|
| `excluded_samples.rds` | All excluded sample IDs |
| `qc_final_params.rds` | Final thresholds + sample lists |
| `control_genomes_all_samples.rds` | Control data (all samples) |
| `global_methylation_per_sample.rds` | Per-sample global methylation |

## Differential Methylation

### Multi-Scenario

| Scenario | Covariates | When |
|---|---|---|
| **Basic** | None | Always |
| **Batch_Correction** | Batch columns | If enabled |
| **Covariate_Adj** | Covariates | If enabled |
| **Full_Model** | Both | If both enabled |

### Export Strategy

| File | Content | When |
|---|---|---|
| `DMC_<Model>.xlsx/.bed` | Significant DMCs (with Mean_CTL, Mean_Test, Status) | If any pass |
| `DMC_relaxed_<Model>.xlsx` | Q-value only | If strict finds nothing |
| `Full_<Model>.xlsx` | All positions | Always |

### DiffMeth Explorer UI

Interactive volcano plot, DMC table with export, and signature creation.

![DiffMeth Explorer](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.DiffMeth.png){width=100%}

## Signatures & Validation

Default signatures: top 500 DMCs ranked by
$\text{score} = -\log_{10}(q) \times |\text{diff}|$

Validation methods:

- **SVM** with cross-validation (LOOCV for small samples)
- **PCA** for unsupervised separation
- **Silhouette** for clustering quality

![Validation Overview](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.Validation.Overview.png){width=100%}
![Validation PCA](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.Validation.PCA1.png){width=100%}
![Validation PCA](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.Validation.PCA2.png){width=100%}
![Validation SVM](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.Validation.SVM.png){width=100%}
![Validation Top Loci](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.Validation.TOP.png){width=100%}
![Validation CpG Details](../img/mETHYLotest.NGS.Validation.CpG_details.png){width=100%}

---

# Reports

## QC Report (`Final_QC_Report.html`)

Generated at the end of the QC loop:

- QC parameters and iteration count
- Excluded samples with reasons
- Coverage statistics per sample
- Methylation profile by chromosome (barplot + heatmap)
- Global methylation per group (Control vs Case)
- Control genomes (all samples, PASS/WARN)
- QC assessment flags

[View example QC Report](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/OMICShub-Imagine/mETHYLotest/blob/main/inst/tutorials/NGS_DEMO_QC_Report.html){target="_blank"}

## Validation Report (`Validation_Report.html`)

Generated after signature validation:

- Benchmark table comparing all signatures (performance, silhouette)
- Per-signature detailed report:
  - SVM metrics (AUC/Accuracy, Sensitivity, Kappa)
  - PCA with confidence ellipses + scree plot
  - Hierarchical clustering heatmap
  - Confusion matrix and ROC curve
  - Top 20 discriminative loci
  - CpG locus details (per-group means, delta)
  - Per-fold accuracy (cross-validation)

[View example Validation Report](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/OMICShub-Imagine/mETHYLotest/blob/main/inst/tutorials/NGS_DEMO_Validation_Report.html){target="_blank"}

## Final Report (`Final_Report.html`)

Generated at the end of the pipeline:

- Project summary and parameters
- Sample table with exclusion status
- Comparative analysis (correlation, clustering)
- Differential methylation (summary, volcano, distribution per scenario)
- Genomic annotation
- Signature validation summary
- File inventory

[View example Final Report](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/OMICShub-Imagine/mETHYLotest/blob/main/inst/tutorials/NGS_DEMO_Final_Report.html){target="_blank"}
---

# Project Structure

```
My_Project/
|-- data/
|   |-- selected_samples.xlsx
|   +-- interim/
|       |-- myobj_raw.rds
|       |-- excluded_samples.rds
|       |-- qc_final_params.rds
|       |-- control_genomes_all_samples.rds
|       |-- global_methylation_per_sample.rds
|       |-- diff_results_list.rds
|       +-- validation_results.rds
|
+-- Results/
    |-- project_config.R
    |-- Final_QC_Report.html
    |-- Final_Report.html
    |-- QC/cov_1/, QC/cov_10/
    |-- Comparative_Analysis/figures/
    |-- Differential_Analysis/
    |-- Tiling_Windows/
    |-- Segmentation/
    |-- Signatures/
    |-- Validation/
    |-- DiffMeth_Figures/
    +-- Annotation/
```

---

# Configuration Reference

```{r config-ref}
# Paths
cfg$project_name; cfg$project_dir; cfg$res_dir
cfg$rds_dir; cfg$pheno_file

# Import
cfg$assembly          # "hg38"
cfg$context           # "CpG"
cfg$min_coverage      # = qc_lo_count
cfg$pipeline          # "bismarkCytosineReport" or list(...)
cfg$coord_offset      # 0 (Bismark) or 1 (BED)

# QC
cfg$qc_lo_count       # 10
cfg$qc_hi_perc        # 99.9

# Coverage Normalization
cfg$do_normalize_coverage  # TRUE/FALSE
cfg$normalize_cov_method   # "median" or "mean"

# Analysis
cfg$unite_destrand    # TRUE
cfg$cluster_dist      # "correlation"
cfg$cluster_method    # "ward"
cfg$diff_overdispersion  # "MN"
cfg$diff_test         # "Chisq"
cfg$diff_cutoff       # 10
cfg$diff_qvalue       # 0.05
cfg$annot_diff_cutoff # same as diff_cutoff
cfg$annot_qval_cutoff # 0.05

# Adjustments
cfg$perform_batch_correction  # TRUE/FALSE
cfg$batch_cols        # c("Batch")
cfg$perform_covariate_adj     # TRUE/FALSE
cfg$covariates        # c("Sex")

# System
cfg$num_cores         # 4
cfg$save_raw_obj      # TRUE
```

---

# Supported File Formats

| Format | Example line |
|---|---|
| **Bismark CytosineReport** | `chr1  10525  +  0  2  CpG  CGT` |
| **Bismark Coverage** | `chr1  10525  10525  100  2  0` |
| **modkit bedMethyl** | `chr1  100  101  m  913  +  ...  38  0.913  ...` |
| **f5c / Nanopolish** | `chr1  100  101  +  1  38  35  0.921  ACGT` |
| **pb-CpG-tools** | `chr1  100  101  m  0  +  ...  38  92.1` |

---

# Troubleshooting

| Error | Cause | Solution |
|---|---|---|
| `non-numeric argument` | Wrong column mapping | Check preset/col numbers |
| `All samples excluded` | Over-aggressive QC | Relax thresholds |
| `Only one treatment group` | All of one group excluded | Lower coverage |
| `overfitting risk` | Too many covariates | Reduce variables |
| `No DMCs found` | Strict thresholds | Lower diff_cutoff |
| `methSeg` crash | Too few CpGs | Check unite output |
| Offset wrong | Missing +1 for BED | Set coord_offset = 1 |
| Control not detected | Unknown pattern | Add to control_chr_patterns |

### Performance Tips

- `dbtype = "tabix"` for large files (>10M CpGs)
- Increase `num_cores` for DiffMeth and unite
- `save_raw_obj = TRUE` to skip reimport
- Disable tiling/segmentation for quick runs

---

# Citation

```{r citation, eval=TRUE}
citation("mETHYLotest")
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
